params.name: Super Gene Certificate
params.description: For people who have the Super Gene, life is a walk in the park. Super Gene Corp favors Travelers with exceptional talents. Tailoring a specific set of personal growth project, seeking to best increase their DNA during every stage, paving a solid foundation for their exorcism!
